case_title: ARMEN SADAIKAN VS. FOG CITY TAXI, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT FOG CITY CAB
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2011 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,295.00 FILED BY SADAIKAN, ARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT FOG CITY TAXI, INC. HOE, JOHNNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-25-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FOG CITY TAXI, INC. HOE, JOHNNY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: BERTHA PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FOG CITY TAXI, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY SADAIKAN, ARMEN FOG CITY TAXI, INC.
CASE DISMISSED AS TO JOHNNY HOE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-18-2011 AT 1:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SADAIKAN, ARMEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOG CITY TAXI, INC. $2,961.00 PRINCIPAL, $121.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,082.00, 50% OF CLAIMED AND UNREIMBURSED MEDICAL COSTS, LOST WAGES, AND PAIN AND SUFFERING ALLOWED LIABILITY AGAINST THE OTHER TAXI COMPANY INVOLVED IN THE COLLISION IS NOT DECIDED HERE. NO LIABILITY IS FOUND AGAINST DRIVER JOHNNY HOE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
